tags.name: re-tabs
tags.description: Self-managing wrapper around the tabs pattern (enhanceTabs). `element.value` reads/writes the selected tab id; emits `re-change`. Register with `import "@relements/core/elements/re-tabs"`.

tags.name: re-menu
tags.description: Self-managing wrapper around the menu-button pattern (enhanceMenuButton). `element.open` reflects/controls the open state; emits `re-select`. Register with `import "@relements/core/elements/re-menu"`.

tags.name: re-popover
tags.description: Self-managing wrapper around the native popover attribute (enhancePopover). Auto-adopts `popover="auto"`; `.show()`/`.hide()`/`.toggle()` map to the native API; emits `re-toggle`. Register with `import "@relements/core/elements/re-popover"`.

tags.name: re-toast
tags.description: Self-managing toast region in light DOM. `.show(message, options)` matches showToast() and returns the same controller. Register with `import "@relements/core/elements/re-toast"`.

tags.name: re-file-picker
tags.description: Self-managing wrapper around the custom file picker (enhanceFilePicker). `.files` reads/writes the selection, `.clear()` empties it; emits `re-error` on a rejected drop. Reflects `multiple`/`accept`/`disabled`/`required` onto the native input. Register with `import "@relements/core/elements/re-file-picker"`.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allow selecting more than one file.

attributes.name: accept
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of accepted file types.

globalAttributes.name: data-emphasis
globalAttributes.description: Visual emphasis — `solid` uses a filled status surface.

globalAttributes.name: data-placement
globalAttributes.description: Placement of a floating part (tooltip bubble, etc.) around its anchor.

globalAttributes.name: data-shape
globalAttributes.description: Shape variant (e.g. avatar circle / square / text).

globalAttributes.name: data-tone
globalAttributes.description: Semantic color tone (info / success / warning / danger / neutral).

globalAttributes.name: data-variant
globalAttributes.description: Structural variant of a component (e.g. button/link/table style).

globalAttributes.name: data-autosize
globalAttributes.description: Grow a textarea to fit its content.

globalAttributes.name: data-full-width
globalAttributes.description: Stretch to the full available inline size.

globalAttributes.name: data-indeterminate
globalAttributes.description: Show an indeterminate (spinning) progress ring with no known value.

globalAttributes.name: data-invalid
globalAttributes.description: Mark the control as invalid (error styling).

globalAttributes.name: data-label
globalAttributes.description: Render a separator as a labeled divider — a horizontal rule with centred text.

globalAttributes.name: data-open
globalAttributes.description: Force the open/visible state without interaction.

globalAttributes.name: data-placeholder
globalAttributes.description: Marks the multi-select value text while the placeholder (no selection) shows.

globalAttributes.name: data-sticky
globalAttributes.description: Stick the element to the viewport edge while scrolling.

globalAttributes.name: data-sticky-header
globalAttributes.description: Keep the table header visible while scrolling.

globalAttributes.name: data-re-command-hotkey
globalAttributes.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the command palette (e.g. `mod+k`).

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dialog-close
globalAttributes.description: Marks a button that closes the enclosing dialog.

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dialog-close-on-backdrop
globalAttributes.description: Dismiss the dialog on backdrop click.

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dialog-target
globalAttributes.description: Id of the dialog a trigger opens.

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dialog-trigger
globalAttributes.description: Marks a button that opens its target dialog (enhanceDialog).

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dismiss
globalAttributes.description: Marks a button that dismisses its dismissible container (enhanceDismissible).

globalAttributes.name: data-re-dismissible
globalAttributes.description: Marks a container that can be dismissed.

globalAttributes.name: data-re-multiselect-required
globalAttributes.description: Require at least one selection (enhanceMultiSelect enforces it on submit).
